Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order, For An Accommodation, And For Sanctions Against Opposing Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

David Wasserman, Esq. 415-567-9600 of Wasserman-Stern appearance for defendants Paul F. Cademartori and Frances G. Codemartori via zoom.
Charles M. Schaible, Esq. 415-823-7912 of Law Office of Charles Schaible appearance for plaintiffs via zoom.
Margaret Lesniak, Esq. 415-949-1900 of Demler, Armstrong & Rowland, LLP appearance for defendants Paul F. Cademartori and Frances G. Codemartori via zoom.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

Court instructs parties to discuss among themselves the options presented to them in the tentative ruling. Parties report to the Court parties come to agreement. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DIANE AARON, CHARLES SCHAIBLE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER, FOR AN ACCOMMODATION, AND FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST OPPOSING COUNSEL is GRANTED. Parties are to meet and confer as to form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
